main_subtitle: The first AI-native content and campaign platform built for modern hospitality.
main_subtitle2_part1_boost: Improve performance across both direct and OTA bookings
simplify_content_without_the_manual_work: Simplify content without the manual work.
features_subtitle: Generate custom brand and tone guidelines automatically. Refine them as needed and ensure consistency across all touchpoints.
feature_content_description: Continuously scan your content across platforms. Get actionable improvement suggestions or let Mar CMS automatically implement them.
feature_multilingual_description: Create SEO-optimized, multilingual content tailored to each guest persona and channel, fully aligned with your brand voice.
feature_campaign_description: Plan, publish, and optimize campaigns across all digital platforms, OTAs, your website, and social media from a single place.
feature_review_description: Track guest reviews across platforms. Detect sentiment trends, improvement opportunities, and reply automatically to reviews using your brand’s tone.
feature_analytics_description: Access all content, campaign performance, and engagement insights in one place, driven by real-time data.
video_subtitle: See how hotels use Mar CMS to save time, improve content, and increase bookings.
pricing_basic_description: For teams needing insight and control.
pricing_reviewer_description: For teams focused on review and improvement.
pricing_creator_description: For high-performing teams ready to scale.
pricing_creator_feature_5: Campaign manager for content creation and distribution
question_1_answer: Mar CMS is an AI-native content and campaign platform designed specifically for the hospitality industry. It unifies content creation, optimization, and distribution across all digital channels.
question_2: What digital channels does Mar CMS support?
question_2_answer: Mar CMS works across your website, OTAs, social media platforms, and more. There are 5 channels in total.
question_3_answer: Yes. You can generate and publish multilingual content tailored to your brand, your guest personas, and each channel, all SEO-optimized.
question_4: Is it hard to set up?
question_4_answer: No. Mar CMS is built to integrate easily with your current systems. Most teams are fully up and running within hours.
question_5_answer: AI Credits are used for generating content, replies, and recommendations. Each plan includes a monthly credit allowance based on usage needs.
question_6: Can I respond to guest reviews automatically?
question_6_answer: Yes. The Creator plan includes automatic replies to reviews, aligned with your brand voice.
question_7_answer: Absolutely. We follow strict security protocols and GDPR compliance to ensure your data and guest information are safe.
question_8: How many users can we onboard?
question_8_answer: You can onboard as many users as you need. Pricing is per user, and plans can scale with your team.
question_9: Do I need technical knowledge to use it?
question_9_answer: No. Mar CMS is designed for hospitality marketers and managers. No technical background required.
question_10: What if I just want to try it out?
question_10_answer: You can book a demo or start with the Basic plan to explore how Mar CMS fits your team’s workflow.
call_to_action_subtitle: Schedule a call to meet our team
itb_page_title: AI-Native CMS for Hospitality Marketing Teams | Mar-CMS
itb_page_description: Visiting ITB Berlin? Discover an AI-native CMS built for hotel marketing teams. Automate campaigns, manage content, and drive performance. Book a demo.
itb_hero_subtitle: Plan campaigns faster, manage content centrally, and drive performance across properties and markets.
itb_hero_note: Built for hotels and hotel groups navigating modern digital marketing.
itb_context_title: From ideas at ITB to execution in your marketing.
itb_context_text: ITB Berlin is where hotel teams discover new technologies and marketing approaches. Mar-CMS helps turn those ideas into operational marketing systems, combining campaign automation, content management, and performance visibility in one platform.
itb_core_title: What hotel marketing teams can do with Mar-CMS
itb_core_1_text: Plan and execute campaigns across properties and markets without fragmented tools. Automate scheduling, publishing, and optimization from one place.
itb_core_2_text: Control brand content, assets, and messaging from one platform. Keep everything aligned across properties, channels, and languages.
itb_core_3_text: Track what works and optimize campaigns based on real outcomes. Turn engagement data into actionable marketing decisions.
itb_core_4_text: Reduce manual coordination and repetitive marketing workflows. Free your team to focus on strategy, not spreadsheets.
itb_product_title: An AI-Native CMS for the Digital Hospitality World
itb_product_subtitle: Mar-CMS connects content, campaigns, and performance in one system designed for modern hotel marketing operations.
itb_pf1_text: Plan, publish, and optimize campaigns across all digital platforms: OTAs, your website, and social media, all from a single place. Visualize timelines, assign tasks, and track progress across properties.
itb_pf2_text: Continuously scan your content across platforms. Get actionable improvement suggestions, or let Mar-CMS automatically implement them. AI-driven scores highlight what needs attention first.
itb_pf3_text: Generate custom brand and tone guidelines automatically. Ensure consistency across all touchpoints, from OTA listings to guest emails to social posts. Each property can have its own voice profile.
itb_mock_ca_suggestion_1: Update Expedia room descriptions to include seasonal amenities and local attractions. Expected +18% conversion lift.
itb_mock_ca_suggestion_2: Booking.com images are outdated. Replace lobby photos with 2026 renovation imagery for brand consistency.
itb_usecase_title: Designed for Hotel and Hotel Group Marketing Teams
itb_usecase_1_text: Coordinate campaigns across locations without duplicating work. One system, every property, fully synchronized.
itb_usecase_2_text: Ensure messaging, visuals, and tone remain aligned across all properties and channels, no matter how fast you scale.
itb_usecase_3_text: Move from planning to execution without operational friction. Reduce launch timelines from weeks to days.
itb_why_1_text: Automation is embedded across content and campaigns, not bolted on as an afterthought.
itb_why_2_text: Built for hotel workflows, not adapted from generic CMS tools designed for other industries.
itb_why_3_text: A single environment instead of disconnected marketing tools, spreadsheets, and dashboards.
itb_why_4_text: Reduce manual work and increase marketing velocity. Focus your team's energy on strategy, not operations.
itb_cta_title: Exploring new marketing technologies at ITB?
itb_cta_subtitle: Discover how an AI-native CMS can simplify campaign execution, centralize content, and support performance-driven hotel marketing.
itb_cta_urgency: High demand during the ITB period. Book your slot now.

v2_hero_title_after: Is the New Standard in Hospitality.
v2_hero_subtitle: Mar aligns your content, campaigns, and digital presence so every interaction strengthens your brand.
v2_problem_text: Hospitality brands are active everywhere — website, social media, OTAs, Google listings. But activity is not strategy.
v2_problem_item_5: Marketing teams operate reactively, not strategically
v2_problem_closing: In a digital-first market, inconsistency costs trust and revenue.
v2_shift_text: Mar is not another content tool. It is the operating layer that connects your entire marketing ecosystem into one structured system — designed for hospitality.
v2_cap_title: A Marketing Operating Layer for Hospitality
v2_cap_1_text: Maintain consistent positioning and tone across every channel.
v2_cap_2_text: Plan and launch campaigns aligned with defined goals.
v2_cap_3_text: Ensure your website, social platforms, and listings reflect one strategic narrative.
v2_cap_4_text: Understand what drives engagement and impact — and act with clarity.
v2_cap_5_text: Stay relevant across markets without losing brand integrity.
v2_cap_footer: AI powers the infrastructure. Your brand remains at the center.
v2_hosp_adapt: Mar adapts to independent properties, groups, and growing hospitality chains without adding operational complexity.
v2_partner_title: Build the Future of Hospitality Marketing.
v2_partner_subtitle: We are onboarding a limited number of hospitality brands to shape the next generation of marketing infrastructure.
v2_partner_benefit_1_text: Be among the first to leverage a marketing operating layer purpose-built for hospitality.
v2_partner_benefit_2_text: Help shape future PMS and OTA integrations based on your operational needs.
v2_partner_benefit_3_text: Dedicated support to configure Mar around your brand, properties, and workflows.
v2_partner_benefit_4_text: Get early access to new features and capabilities before general availability.
v2_partner_benefit_5_text: Direct input into the product roadmap. Your feedback drives what we build next.
v2_faq_a1: No. Mar does not replace your website CMS. It operates above your existing systems, aligning content, campaigns, and performance across your digital ecosystem.
v2_faq_a2: No. Mar is designed for marketing managers and general managers. The system is structured, intuitive, and easy to operate.
v2_faq_q3: Will Mar integrate with PMS and OTAs?
v2_faq_a3: PMS and OTA integrations are part of the future roadmap and will evolve with partner needs.
v2_faq_q4: Which social media channels does Mar support?
v2_faq_a4: Mar currently integrates with Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, Threads, and Google Business Profile. Additional channels will expand over time.
v2_faq_a5: No. Mar is built for modern hospitality brands, including hotels, resorts, restaurant groups, and multi-property operators.
